hawkish_phrases: underlying price pressures continued to lack a convincing upward trend and remained an ongoing source of concern
the projected path of inflation remained conditional on exceptionally supportive financing conditions
the Governing Council's ability to act if needed
potential revisions of the parameters had to take due consideration of their effectiveness from a monetary policy perspective
risks to the growth outlook were assessed to remain tilted to the downside
dovish_phrases: key ECB interest rates to remain at present or lower levels for an extended period of time
monthly asset purchases of €80 billion were intended to run until the end of March 2017, or beyond, if necessary
members widely agreed that policy action at the present meeting was not warranted
determined to preserve the very substantial degree of monetary accommodation
summary: The Governing Council held all policy rates unchanged (main refinancing at 0.00%, deposit facility at -0.40%) with unanimous agreement that no action was warranted, confirming €80 billion monthly purchases through at least March 2017 while emphasizing readiness to act if needed amid continued concerns about weak underlying inflation and downside risks.
